installConfigs.instructions: Works out of the box without authentication. For higher rate limits, sign up at https://context7.com/dashboard and add your API key to the server config: "serverAuthToken": "<your-api-key>", "serverAuthTokenHeader": "CONTEXT7_API_KEY".
